title: On Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: On Holding reported Q1 2022 net sales increased by 67.9% to CHF 235.7 million, with net income of CHF 14.3 million and adjusted EBITDA of CHF 15.7 million despite a continued challenging supply chain environment. On delivered a first quarter gross profit margin of 51.8%, down from 57.6% in the prior year period, reflecting transitory headwinds from higher airfreight share and corresponding expenses. The company's DTC (direct-to-consumer) channel showed strong momentum. Q1 2022 marked the start of a new fiscal year for the company with solid growth despite margin pressures from freight costs. Management expressed confidence in the company's long-term growth strategy despite near-term supply chain challenges.
